case_title: SHAKED VACATION HOMES, LLC VS. TIM LOOS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $55.00 SERVED MAR-05-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOOS, TIM

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAKED VACATION HOMES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES $5,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,535.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TIM LOOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SHAKED VACATION HOMES, LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES $2,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,680.00, PRINCIPLE AMOUNT IS DEPOSIT LESS LOCK CHANGE CHARGE. FEES FOR SERVICE ON DISMISSED DEFENDANT AND VACANT UNIT NOT RECOVERABLE. CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF SHAKED VACATION HOMES, INC. AND AGAINST PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES(ZERO JUDGMENT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.) RESPONDENT SHAKED VACATION HOMES, INC. HAD POSSESSION 11/21/2011 WHEN LOCK WAS CHANGED, AND NO RENT FOR DEC.2011 WAS DUE.
